Project.NAME: video-slide-md
Project.keywords: video, slides, markdown, presentation, open-cv, computer-vision, slide-detection, subtitle-alignment, srt, vtt, marp, llm, lm-studio, vision, gui, pyside6, project, timeline
Project.annotation: Automatically extract slide intervals from educational videos, link to SRT/VTT subtitles, enhance with LLM vision analysis, export presentations, and manage projects via GUI and CLI.

M-MODELS.NAME: Models
M-MODELS.purpose: Pydantic data models for slides document

type-SlidesDocument.PURPOSE: Root document containing all slide segments

type-SlideSegment.PURPOSE: Single slide interval with transcript and metadata

type-SubtitleCue.PURPOSE: Single subtitle entry with time and text

M-CLI.NAME: CLI
M-CLI.purpose: Typer CLI entry point for detect, detect-slides, notes, roi-tool, project, export-md, export-pptx, debug, llm-process commands

fn-detect.PURPOSE: All-in-one: video + optional subtitles → slides.json + images + optional exports

fn-detect_slides.PURPOSE: Standalone: video only → slides.json + screenshots, no subtitles

fn-roi_tool_cmd.PURPOSE: GUI: video frame → mouse drag rect → ignore-roi coordinates

fn-project_create.PURPOSE: CLI: create new project with video/subtitle paths

fn-project_open.PURPOSE: CLI: open existing project and print info

fn-project_info.PURPOSE: CLI: show project state and settings

fn-export_md.PURPOSE: Export slides.json to Marp Markdown presentation

fn-llm_process.PURPOSE: Enrich slides.json with LLM vision analysis and corrected transcript

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Configuration loading — YAML file + CLI arg merge

M-VIDEO-DECODE.NAME: VideoDecode
M-VIDEO-DECODE.purpose: Video frame decoding and sampling at given fps with multi-backend support

M-ROI.NAME: ROI
M-ROI.purpose: Slide ROI management — crop and mask ignore regions

M-FRAME-FEATURES.NAME: FrameFeatures
M-FRAME-FEATURES.purpose: Frame feature extraction: pHash, dHash, histogram, grayscale, pixel MAE, visual distance

M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.NAME: SlideDetector
M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.purpose: Slide change detection via frame comparison with threshold and debounce

M-SEGMENTER.NAME: Segmenter
M-SEGMENTER.purpose: Convert change events to slide intervals with representative timestamps

M-DEDUPE.NAME: Dedupe
M-DEDUPE.purpose: Deduplicate adjacent slide segments via hash/SSIM similarity

M-SUBTITLES.NAME: Subtitles
M-SUBTITLES.purpose: SRT/VTT parsing and alignment of cues to slide intervals

M-PPTX-EXPORT.NAME: PptxExport
M-PPTX-EXPORT.purpose: Export slides.json to PPTX with slide images and speaker notes

M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.NAME: NotesProcessor
M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.purpose: Process raw transcript into clean speaker notes: basic cleanup or LLM rephrase

M-DEBUG-EXPORT.NAME: DebugExport
M-DEBUG-EXPORT.purpose: Generate debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg

M-LLM-CLIENT.NAME: LlmClient
M-LLM-CLIENT.purpose: OpenAI-compatible LLM client with vision support, model lifecycle management

M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.NAME: SlideAnalyzer
M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.purpose: Analyze slide screenshot via LLM vision: description + key terms extraction

M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.NAME: LlmOrchestrator
M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.purpose: Orchestrate LLM pipeline: load model → analyze slides → rephrase → unload → save

M-PIPELINE.NAME: PipelineOrchestrator
M-PIPELINE.purpose: Wire all modules in CLI detect (all-in-one mode)

M-DETECT-SLIDES.NAME: DetectSlides
M-DETECT-SLIDES.purpose: Standalone slide detection: video → slides.json + screenshots, no subtitles
M-DETECT-SLIDES.depends: M-VIDEO-DECODE, M-SLIDE-DETECTOR, M-SEGMENTER, M-DEDUPE, M-ROI, M-MODELS

M-NOTES.NAME: Notes
M-NOTES.purpose: Post-process notes: slides.json + subtitles → cleaned notes, no video re-decode

M-ROI-TOOL.NAME: RoiTool
M-ROI-TOOL.purpose: Graphical ROI selector: video frame → mouse drag → ignore-roi coordinates

M-PROJECT.NAME: ProjectManager
M-PROJECT.purpose: Project management: create, open, save project.json with configs and pipeline state

fn-create_project.PURPOSE: Create project directory and project.json with given parameters

fn-open_project.PURPOSE: Load project.json, validate, return Project object

fn-update_project_state.PURPOSE: Update state flags after pipeline steps

M-GUI-MAIN.NAME: MainWindow
M-GUI-MAIN.purpose: Main GUI window with project management, video/backend selection, detect button, central timeline+subtitle area
M-GUI-MAIN.depends: M-PROJECT, M-GUI-TIMELINE, M-GUI-SETTINGS, M-GUI-WORKER, M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-NOTES, M-BACKENDS

type-MainWindow.PURPOSE: QMainWindow subclass with toolbars, panels, and menu

M-GUI-TIMELINE.NAME: TimelineWidget
M-GUI-TIMELINE.purpose: Custom timeline widget: QPainter-drawn time axis with colored slide blocks, click-to-select, subtitle panel

fn-TimelineWidget.PURPOSE: Custom QWidget rendering slide intervals as colored blocks on a time axis

signal-selected_slide_changed.PURPOSE: Emitted when user clicks a slide block, passes segment index

fn-SubtitlePanel.PURPOSE: QWidget showing subtitle text for selected slide with Process LLM button

M-GUI-SETTINGS.NAME: SettingsDialog
M-GUI-SETTINGS.purpose: Settings dialog with tabs for LLM prompt, GPU/Backend, and Detection configuration

fn-SettingsDialog.PURPOSE: QDialog with QTabWidget for LLM, GPU/Backend, Detection tabs

tab-LLM.PURPOSE: Editable system prompt field, model name, base URL

tab-GPUBackend.PURPOSE: Radio buttons for backend selection, CUDA availability info

tab-Detection.PURPOSE: Threshold, min slide duration, min stable duration, ROI fields

M-GUI-WORKER.NAME: Workers
M-GUI-WORKER.purpose: QThread-based background workers for detect, notes, and LLM operations with progress signaling

type-DetectWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs detect-slides on project, emits progress/finished/error

type-NotesWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs notes pipeline on project

type-LlmWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs LLM processing on selected segment text

signal-progress.PURPOSE: emitted (int percent, str status_message) during operation

M-COLAB.NAME: ColabDeployment
M-COLAB.purpose: Google Colab notebook for running pipeline with free T4 GPU

CrossLink.relation: runs LLM processing in background thread
